items.title: fix(UI5): Rename GitHub repository and bump SHAs (#1976)

items.title: Fix MCP URL probe: connection failure was reported as PASS (#1922)
items.snippet: curl writes "000" to -w '%{http_code}' on a connection failure AND exits nonzero. The previous fallback put the echo inside the command substitution — both wrote, the captured value was "000000", and the case statement's 000) arm didn't match, so dead hosts fell through to PASS. Move the fallback as

items.title: Rename mcp-gateway -> mcp-proxy throughout
items.snippet: Aligns the compose service name, local config filename, and all log/restart commands with the image and binary name. Adds an explicit -config arg since the image CMD still defaults to the legacy /etc/mcp-gateway path.  :house: Remote-Dev: homespace

items.title: Link to public MCP tunnels docs and use public mcp-proxy image

items.title: Add mcp-tunnels plugin
items.snippet: Adds the /create-docker-mcp-tunnel command, which drives the MCP tunnels Docker Compose quickstart end to end: preflight checks, certificate generation, proxy config, cloudflared, an optional sample FastMCP server, and verification from Managed Agents and the Messages API.  Migrated from anthropic-e

items.title: Merge pull request #1935 from anthropics/fix/quote-claude-plugin-root-paths
items.snippet: fix: quote ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} in hookify and security-guidance hook commands

items.title: fix: quote \${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} in hookify and security-guidance hook commands
items.snippet: Paths containing spaces (common on Windows, e.g. C:\Users\Some User\...) cause shell word-splitting when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT is unquoted, resulting in hooks erroring with "No such file or directory" on every tool call.  Wraps the path in double quotes for all five affected hook commands. Fixes the pa

Add the missing path field where the manifest moved into a subdirectory, correct stale ref/commit metad

items.title: Raise bump cap with verdict cache and skip-and-revert (#1913)
items.snippet: * Cache scan verdicts and drop policy-failing entries from bump PRs  Three changes that together let the nightly bump clear any backlog in a single run without blocking on a single bad upstream or re-burning Claude time on already-scanned SHAs:  - bump-plugin-shas.yml: raise max-bumps default 20 ->

items.title: Bump 21 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD (#1911)
Bump 27 plugin SHA pins to upstream HEAD (#1912)
Run plugin SHA bump nightly instead of weekly (#1909)
items.snippet: Upstream plugins move daily; a weekly sweep with a 20-bump cap can fall behind. Each run force-resets the bump branch, so stale unmerged PRs are replaced rather than piling up.

items.title: Add CI check for HTTP MCP server URL liveness (#1910)
items.snippet: Walks marketplace.json for vendored plugins, extracts http/sse MCP server URLs from .mcp.json / mcp.json / plugin.json, and probes each with HEAD then a JSON-RPC POST fallback. Fails on 404/410 and connection errors; passes on auth/method errors (expected without credentials). Runs on PR, daily sche

items.title: Fix servicenow-sdk ref: ServiceNow/sdk uses master, not main (#1830)
items.snippet: The ServiceNow/sdk repository's default branch is 'master' and there is no 'main' branch. The pinned SHA (06adf37) is the current head of 'master'. Update the ref so future SHA bumps target the correct branch.

items.title: code-modernization: harden writes a patch instead of editing legacy; make map/security guidance language-agnostic
items.snippet: - modernize-harden: never edits legacy/ anymore. Writes findings plus a   reviewed unified diff to analysis/<system>/security_remediation.patch.   A second security-auditor pass reviews each hunk (RESOLVES / PARTIAL /   INTRODUCES-RISK) before presenting. The user reviews and applies the   patch del

items.title: Harden code-modernization plugin from a real CardDemo dry run
items.snippet: Fixes found by running the discovery workflow against the AWS CardDemo mainframe sample (~50 KLOC of COBOL/CICS/JCL/BMS/VSAM):  - modernize-assess: add scc -> cloc -> find/wc fallback chain with the   COCOMO-II formula so Step 1 works when scc isn't installed; same for   portfolio-mode cloc/lizard.

items.title: Fix code-modernization plugin: align README with commands, fix pipeline gaps

items.title: Make Scan Plugins a viable required check; auto-dispatch on bump PRs (#1815)
items.snippet: Scan Plugins is meant to gate every change to marketplace.json, but two gaps made that unenforceable:  1. The bump workflow opens PRs with GITHUB_TOKEN, which GitHub exempts    from on:pull_request triggers. Weekly bump PRs (e.g. #1809) get no    scan check at all. 2. The workflow had a paths filter

items.title: Bump bump-plugin-shas action so bump commits are signed (#1814)
items.snippet: The pinned version of anthropics/claude-plugins-community's bump-plugin-shas action creates the bump commit with a local git commit, which is unsigned and unmergeable under the required_signatures ruleset on main.
